Required changes: (1) Change line 1471 text from '8 detailed modules' to '14 detailed modules', (2) Add 6 additional topic-badge divs for new modules (JS Classes, JS Events, HTML Forms, CSS Responsive, Web APIs, and one more). Once the fix feature is completed, user-testing-validator-platform-ui should be run again to confirm the fix.
